markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Surge AI's customer acquisition process and product offering details.](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI targets high-intent, well-funded customers (primarily frontier model labs) through inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Preference for direct engagement with engineering teams over AI data ops teams due to better understanding of data quality](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Pricing is non-negotiable and typically higher than competitors, justified by superior quality](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Comprehensive model evaluation process ("eval") used to guide data recommendations and showcase expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Customer Acquisition Process

  - [Inbound-focused strategy, no outbound sales motion](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Two primary contact types: researchers/engineers (preferred) or AI data ops teams](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Word-of-mouth driven, with recent increase from public appearances](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Initial calls focus on understanding customer needs and showcasing Surge's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Quality demonstration through conversation or data samples is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Contracting and Pricing

  - [Negotiation primarily on standard terms (indemnity, liability, IP rights)](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Pricing often higher than competitors, causing initial surprise](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Non-negotiable pricing model based on hourly rates](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Aim for initial projects worth at least a couple million dollars](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Model Evaluation and Insights

  - [Comprehensive "eval" process comparing customer's model to competitors (e.g., ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Uses diverse, real-world prompts across various domains](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Produces detailed insights deck (70+ slides) highlighting strengths/weaknesses](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Takes about 1.5 weeks to complete (prompt creation, evaluation, deck preparation)](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Builds trust and informs data recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Ongoing Customer Relationship

  - [Organic process after initial project, driven by customer needs](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Periodic re-evaluations to track progress and identify new areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Flexible approach to project scoping and funding (e.g., open POs for large amounts)](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### Challenges and Friction Points

  - [Ongoing price sensitivity with each new project quote](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Requests to work on customer platforms, compromising quality control](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Difficulty in communicating the value of Surge's proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss Surge AI's platform and technology in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Explore ways to better communicate the value and uniqueness of Surge's platform to potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Develop stronger narrative around data investment vs. compute costs to address price sensitivity](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Consider strategies to maintain quality standards when working on customer platforms](https://fathom.video/share/6zyoEfZh2DwKADPu8AkmxQZ44wtr1Q8M?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
